entry.title: Re: Material Listing and Exclusion Configuration in S/4HANA.
entry.content: what are the differences in ECC vs S/4 HANA?

entry.title: Re: Single WF in SAP Data Services
entry.content: a simple way of understanding is that within one WF, multiple DF are in parallel, when WF is started, all DF will be started in parallel. Each DF will have its own al_engine to process data with its own PID. Then different DF is using different al_engine with different PID. Like a different thread.

entry.title: Re: Start Your scripting Journey The Easy Way With SAP Analytics Cloud | Part Two

entry.title: How to Create Custom CDS View of Customer request
entry.content:
Dear all.

The BP master defines the credit recipient.
We would like to I/F the amount of credit limit - receivables balance to other systems for each credit recipient.
To do this, I believe I need to create a CDS view.

(1) Is it necessary to create a CDS view in the first place? Should we take other measures?

(2) In order to create a CDS view for this requirement, please tell us the standard CDS view items, elements, formulas, etc. that are necessary.

Example:
Upper level: Customer A
Lower level: Customer B, Customer C

Balance of Customer A
Receivables: $3,000,000

Balance of Customer B
Receivables: $2,000,000

Balance at Customer C
Receivables: $1,00,000

Credit limit of Customer A

$10,000,000

Data to be I/Fed

$4,000,000

(10,000,000 - 3,000,000 - 2,000,000 - 1,000,000)

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Could not get the ApiHub resource data

wow, that worked for me.

Thanks!

entry.title: Local consumption of business event in S/4HANA ABAP cloud
entry.content:
Could you please explain the below with Example. In My case I am using R_SalesOrderTP . But while implementing in through eclipse it is saying The use of Behavior Definition R_SALESORDERTP is not permitted. I came accrose one more question that as it is i am pasting here. 


"I came across the SAP documentation regarding local consumption of standard business events

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/business-event-consumption?version=s4hana_cloud

And it was highlighted that the event to be consumed needs to be exposed in a C1 released RAP BO interface.

Now I am wondering, are all these events from the accelerator hub for s/4hana cloud based on RAP BO model? And if not, where/how could some of these events were defined/raised?

https://api.sap.com/package/SAPS4HANACloudBusinessEvents/event

Also, is there a way for us to find the behavior definition where the event was defined? Or for that we will need to have access to a live S/4HANA cloud system?"

entry.title: Streamline SAP MDK Development with the Power of Generative AI and Joule
entry.content:
Recently, we introduced a new mobile development experience in SAP Build Code especially for developing SAP mobile development kit (MDK) based applications.

SAP Build Code provides a turn-key environment for coding, testing, integrating, and managing application lifecycles. It also provides a single-entry point for projects through the SAP Build lobby.

We are excited to announce that you can now enhance your existing MDK project using GenAI capabilities via SAP Joule generating app definitions such as i18n files, pages and actions. This feature allows you to leverage AI to streamline and improve your development processes.

MDK commands in Joule panel

Please Note, to use the GenAI feature, you will need an SAP Build Code license.  For more information, see this documentation.

How to use Joule functionality to enhance MDK project
To utilize the Joule functionality in your MDK project, follow these steps:

  1. Open the MDK project at folder level.
  2. Navigate to the Joule panel. Here, you will find the following MDK Gen AI commands:
    • /mdk-gen-i18n Generate MDK i18n file: this command creates translation files (i18n) in one or more languages that contains key-value string pairs. Depending on your business requirements, you can generate additional translation files based on a source file (such as i18n.properties) for various languages. This allows you to cater to a diverse audience and ensure that your application is accessible to users in different regions.


    • /mdk-gen-page Generate MDK Page: this command generates a new page that displays MDK UI controls. Additionally, you may notice other application definitions, such as Rule or Style files, being generated alongside it.
    • /mdk-gen-action Generate MDK Action: This command generates a new MDK action.

      For additional details, see this documentation. 

      New to MDK development?
      Follow these tutorials to get started and learn more about Mobile development kit!
      I am looking forward to your feedback/comments.

entry.title: Re: Difference between SAP S/4HANA :Public Vs Private edition : RISE with SAP
entry.content: Great artical and gives good insight to understand the basics 🙂

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: #Devtoberfest#Petoberfest Constant companion at workplace

entry.title: Re: Handling Multiple Requests from the Same IP in SAP Co...
entry.content:
Hi,

There are some safety measures in SAP CX Standard.
For Example can you configure the "Max Brute Force Login Attempts" per User Group. It will also go Up in the Hierarchy of User Groups to find a Value.
If nothing is maintained the Login attempts will be not restricted.
If you have multiple User Groups assigned with different values, the lowest value will be used.

If you have too many Login attempts your account will be disabled and the Customer needs to contact the Support, to re-enable the Account.

 

Additionally SAP has a "BruteForceAttackHandler" which will be for example be used for applying Vouchers in the "BaseCommerceController"

 

 

protected CartData applyVoucherForCartInternal(final String voucherId, final HttpServletRequest request)
       throws NoCheckoutCartException, VoucherOperationException
{
    final String ipAddress = request.getRemoteAddr();
    if (bruteForceAttackHandler.registerAttempt(ipAddress + "_voucher"))
    {
       throw new VoucherOperationException("You have entered too many voucher codes. Please try again later.");
    }

    return applyVoucherForCartInternal(voucherId);
}

 

 

 

In the CCv2 Cloud Portal you are also able to configure WAF Settings.
See: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003417716 and https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/0fa6bcf4736c46f78c248512391eb467/5ba3561363f54bb999b689fff73dd4c3.html?locale=en-US

Further SAP CX has a default "XSSFilter" (de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.web.XSSFilter) which is based on configured Regular Expression Rules. The Properties has the following syntax:

xss.filter.rule.<ruleName> = <regEx>

or

<extensionName>.xss.filter.rule.<ruleName> = <regEx>

 If it is detected that the Regular Expression is matching the values will be stripped.
You can also configure it to be rejected via:

xss.filter.action=REJECT

The general and "commercewebservice" Rules will also be applied to Requests with a JSON Body through the "de.hybris.platform.webservicescommons.jaxb.adapters.XSSStringAdapter"

Commercewebservices Rules have the format:

commercewebservices.xss.filter.rule.<ruleName> = <regEx>

 and the Values will then be stripped from the Input


Kind Regards,
Stefan Kruk

entry.title: Re: Connecting external Output Management System to SAP Print Queue in SAP Cloud Solutions
entry.content:
Thanks @MV-SAPSE - appreciate your response.

Essentially, as per your implementation above, but what we have done is using SAP_COM_0647, it will send the notification to the integration flow endpoint where it calls the SAP Print API to Get_Next_QItemsExt or RetrieveNextQueueItem then we call an external API that will generate the label/PDF which is why we don't connect S4 Public system directly to Cloud Print Manager, once the PDF is rendered, we call the BTP Print Service API and upload the document/PDF and setup or connect to the Cloud Print Manager installed on a workstation.

The issue currently where we have an open case to SAP Support is that it does not send the push notification to the integration flow endpoint and what we found it is due to the CSRF protection which is not ideal to turn this off, but there appears to be some logic issue with the push notification as it seems to not commit the print queue item not until it has executed the integration flow and the reason why I said this is because there is no new print queue item when you call the Get_Next_QItemsExt or RetrieveNextQueueItem when in fact there is. The bizarre thing is it works perfectly fine if you open or refresh the Maintain Print queue app.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
I am a Computer Science graduate interested in starting a career in SAP. I am particularly drawn to the "SAP Certified Application Associate - Reporting, Modeling, and Data Acquisition with SAP BW/4HANA" certification, as I have a strong interest in data analysis, management, and modeling. With my technical background, I am confident I can work effectively in SAP BW/4HANA for data modeling.

I belong to the following categories: women and individuals who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt, and people in remote or underserved locations with limited access to the same economic opportunities as those in urban or more privileged areas.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Offline Dashboarding
entry.content: SAC story does no offer offline capability. The only option is to export story as PDF and consume offline.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content: I am interested in pursuing the "SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst - SAP Analytics Cloud" certification due to my strong passion for data analysis, management, and modeling. With my technical background, I am confident in my ability to work effectively with SAP Analytics Cloud. As a woman from a remote, underserved location with limited access to opportunities, I seek to overcome these barriers and advance my career.

My name is Phung

I have been working as SAP Consultant for about 2 years now and I have good working experience with SAP ERP. As the SAP are going to update to S4 HANA and Cloud platform, I am eager to learn and get updated with all news feature and refresh.
I believe obtaining a SAP certification will help me to bring more value to my firm and to further my career projections. Please consider my application for certification.


Thank you for this lovely initiative and looking forward to hear from you soon.

entry.title: Re: Stopping a KF calculation due condition, and saving t...
entry.content:
Hi Rodrigo,

You can introduce 2 calculated key-figures, KF2 e KF3:

KF2: use the IBP_CAGGR (cumulative aggregation) function to determine the cumulative sum of the original key-figure KF1.

KF3: implement a simple calculation to compare KF1 and KF2 and evaluate KF3 only in case KF1=KF2.

Hope this helps.

BR

entry.title: Production Order Child Item is another BoM's Parent Item SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to understand on BoM Calculation. 

If We used One Child item into Production Order which is already Parent Item of another BoM then Child item quantity is not deducted from stock. 

Example

Parent 1

                 Child 1

                 Child 2

Here, Child 1 is contain BoM like

Child 1 

      Child 3

       Child 4

 

Here, While generate the production order for Parent 1 Item then Child 3 and Child 3 stock is not deducted from Warehouse. 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Re: Waste Storage Location not appearing in Waste Stream
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you please check within the Manage Locations application that you have the classifier "Storage Location" assigned to your location?

Please let me know if you need further assistance after that.

 

Kind regards, 

Slaveya Petrova

entry.title: Call for Speakers: SAP Inside Track in December
entry.content:
Hello SAP Auckland Community!

We are thrilled to announce that our next SAP Inside Track Community Event is tentatively scheduled for the first week of December, and we are on the lookout for knowledgeable and enthusiastic speakers to share their expertise. Building on the success of our last event hosted by Deloitte, we aim to make this upcoming event even more impactful!

The previous event featured enlightening presentations from two outstanding speakers:

  • Luis Henrique Becker: His session on "Demystifying the Clean Core Strategy for S/4HANA" provided practical insights and strategies to tackle the complexities of the Clean Core approach in SAP S/4HANA.
  • Advit Ramesh: Advit’s talk on "Best Practices with Setting Up DevOps for SAP Integration Suite" offered a comprehensive overview of integrating DevOps practices within the SAP Integration Suite to streamline processes and enhance integration capabilities.

The venue was buzzing with nearly 32 participants who actively contributed to discussions, creating a vibrant atmosphere of learning and networking.

Call for Speakers: We are inviting speakers who can deliver insightful and engaging presentations on a range of SAP-related topics, including but not limited to:

  • SAP implementation success stories and learnings from SAP implementation (technical or functional).
  • Functional areas such as finance, sales, and HR within SAP.
  • Innovations in AI and future SAP developments.
  • Real-world case studies and problem-solving sessions.

Whether you are an experienced speaker or looking to present for the first time, we welcome your proposals and are excited to provide a platform where you can share your knowledge and expertise.

How to Submit Your Proposal: Please send your session proposals to jp.agcamaran@sap.com. Make sure to include:

  • Your name and brief biography.
  • The title of your session.
  • Any specific requirements for your session.

Deadline for Submissions: Please submit your proposals by 30th of November to be considered for the event.

Join us in making this event a memorable and enriching experience for everyone in the SAP community. Your participation as a speaker will help us address the interests and needs of our members more effectively. We look forward to your exciting proposals and thank you in advance for contributing to the success of our next gathering!

entry.title: Manage in house bank account not opening from Fiori
entry.content:
Dear SAP Guru,

During open Manage in house bank account from fiori I am getting the below error.

Title: ErrorMessage: App could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded.Details: { "info": "Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent \"#InhouseBankAccount-manage\"", "technicalMessage": "Failed to fetch.\nTypeError: Failed to fetch.\n at XMLHttpRequest.<anonymous> (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/bootstrap/evo/abap.js:168:1453)\n at o (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:3967)\n at r.dispatch (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:4619)\n at a.handleEvent (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:29547)\n at XMLHttpRequest.t [as _fnHandler] (https://gilfioritest.graphiteindia.com:44300/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/resources/~20231031151700~/sap/ushell_abap/thirdparty/sap-xhrlib-esm.js:5:29890)"}

Please suggest.

Thanks & regards,

Subhasis.

entry.title: Team goal for terminated Managers - how to manager those team goals after manager leave.
entry.content:
Hi all:

Hi 

We are now testing the Team Goal Functionality in latest goal management.

We found that if the managers (who created the team goal) are terminated, the goal (owner is the manager) will disappear in the report. 

The assigned goals (which has a unique ID) will exist with the own of employee.

If goal owner has not shared the team goal to a co-owner before turning to inactive, then this team goal will not be able to share any more, even not possible by importing (action SHARE) by an admin. then of course it will not be able to access, edit and assign any more either.

Only admin can update the fields employee by employee (by using this unique goal id for employee) by importing.

We would like to know if there is any way in this situation to share the goal to the new manager as a co-owner so the new manager has the full access to the team goal created by the manager terminated.

Or is there any workaround to manage in such a situation.

Regards,

Ada

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
Re: Which products are addressed in the SAP Activate methodology for the Intelligent Enterprise road
entry.content:
The SAP Activate methodology for the Intelligent Enterprise roadmap addresses the following products:

  • SAP S/4HANA
  • SAP Ariba

Why?

  • SAP S/4HANA is the core ERP solution within SAP's Intelligent Enterprise framework and is a key focus in the SAP Activate methodology.
  • SAP Ariba is a procurement and supply chain solution that is also part of the Intelligent Enterprise suite.

By any chance, do you have an example with the replacement?

Thanks.
YC

entry.title: Re: How to enable BOM material on sales order item and print it?

I am a woman from Kenya, with a degree in Finance. I've always been interested in the tech industry but have lacked the knowledge and resources. I am eager to upskill myself in SAP technology and pursue job opportunities in this field.

Studying for an SAP certification and finding a job in the tech industry would be life-changing for me. I am passionate and determined to make this transition and I am excited about the possibilities the Digital Skills Initiative can offer.

Thank you for considering my application.

entry.title: Re: Can I add rows to an existing SAP HANA table from a p...
entry.content: Yes, you can use the same create_dataframe_from_pandas() to add new rows to existing data in a table. Set either the upsert of append parameter to True. https://help.sap.com/doc/cd94b08fe2e041c2ba778374572ddba9/2024_3_QRC/en-US/hana_ml.dataframe.html#hana_ml.dataframe.create_dataframe_from_pandas

entry.title: FORM TEMPLATE FOR OUTGOING CHECK IN SAP S/4HANA, PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content:
Hi All,

Good day!

Does anybody know an outgoing check template specifically for the Philippines? Is there any steps that we need to activate or configure for the system to automatically identify all localize/country-specific form templates? 

All I can see in the pre-delivered templates, found in the Maintain Form Templates app,  are the ff: 

  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_US
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_BR
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_FR
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_CA
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_CA_MICR
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_GR
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_MX
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_UK
  • FIN_FO_PAYM_CHECK_TH

Thank You

entry.title: Re: New Backbone Checklists for SAP Solution Manager available!
entry.content:
Hello ben_schneider,

We are looking forward to make checklists id (not steps) mandatory to work item. Meaning, if developer tries to set status without selecting checklist it should prompt with error and not allow to change next status. Please suggest how this can be achieved. (similar to consistency check for checklist step completion - S1_CHECKLIST_DONE) 

Alternatively, to have default checklist for each work item and change document level respectively. 

Thanks and Regards,

Shivani.

Deepak

entry.title: Purchase requestion release strategy got reset when business executed iw38 -Material availabilit che
entry.content:

Business executed material availability check through iw38 transaction, due to this execution BANF (Purchase requestion) release strategy got reset, In CDHDR table observed object BANF release field changes observed. For both Service and Material PR. 

Please suggest which parameter influenced release strategy reset.

entry.title: Re: Archived MDG Change Request isn't listed in "Display...
entry.content:
Yes.

That's why I created this post

entry.title: Re: Migrate the ASE database (On-Prem) to the SAP hana Cl...
entry.content:
Hi Namit,
 
In some way I think you are mixing up some things here, but in other way it seems you are reaching the ASE server, see my comments please:
 
- In the config.properties file for the gateway you specify the host/ip and port where the gateway starts, this is the host of course where you have the gateway sotfware. You are specifiying here 192.18.2.105 with port 5000. That's ok but I highly suggest you to use a different port, something like 6789, the reason is that 5000 is typicaly the port for ASE and just to avoid confusion.
 
- In the config window you have sent I see that you are setting parameters 110 and 111 to 192.168.2.105 and 5000, these should match what you specified in the gateway config file and the ip addrees is wrong, there seems to be a missing 6 in the 2nd number, they must match.
 
- When you make those ip addresses match you get the gateway started in that ip address and your migration project knows that the gateway is running in that ip address, then you need to run the extract command, you say you are using:
 
sapdbmtk overview C:/asedbdir QAS 192.168.2.105 3000 dbuser XXXXXXX
 
But this you are specifying the same ip address for the gateway, and that's wrong, there you should specify the name, ip address and port for the ASE server:
 
sapdbmtk overview C:/asedbdir <ase_name> <ase_host_or_ip> <ase_port> dbuser XXXXXXX
 
Here is where you may have port 5000 because it is the default port for ASE.
 
 
   Can you give a try and tell me if this makes any difference ?.
   
   Thanks.

entry.title: How to get sales order number in BAdI PPH_MRP_PURREQ_CF
entry.content:
For MTO scenario, how to get sales order number in BAdI PPH_MRP_PURREQ_CF when creating PR via MRP. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to get sales order number in BAdI PPH_MRP_PURREQ_CF
entry.content:
Fetch the related data from CDS view : I_PurReqnAcctAssgmtAPI01 based on PR number PURCHASEREQUISITION in the badi.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/10560131c67545fe87ebced0169c163f.html?version=latest

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Extensibility Wizard for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi @Karthik-Thiru, great post!

Is it planned that this Wizard will also be available in On-Premise-Systems in the future releases?

entry.title: Re: OSS Reporting in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @NiklasT 

Thanks for reaching out to the SAP Community. We have forwarded your question to our experts and will come back to you as soon as we can. 

Best regards,

Anja Danneberg

entry.title: Re: Acknowledgment for PO item contains date variance - t...
entry.content:
Hello,

The message shown when the required delivery date for the Purchase Order and the Inbound Delivery posting on different date.

If this message needs to be removed, then check and update the message category in configuration as per below path. 

Application Area: Sourcing and Procurement -> Sub Application Area: Operational Procurement -> Define Attributes of System Messages

ME 795 Acknowledgment for PO item & & contains date variance

Best Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Replication Flow from S/4HANA to Azure Data Lake
entry.content:
Dear @CameronK ,

Do we have any way to integrate Data from S4HANA --> Azure Data Lake directly without going to Datasphere Route??

We have similar Need to get all data for Sales and Inventory process from S4 to Azure Datalake.

Kindly Advise if any direct way or Std. Connector we have to get this served.

Hope for positive response!

Regards,

SD

entry.title: Re: How to extend the default session timeout for a Fiori Application launched in Portal
entry.content: Maybe you have the option to share the code of your plugin in a public Git repository?

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content: @ArjenVHooydonk , Thank you for feedback, I have assign the idea to me and will monitor whether it is generally required by more customers. We don't have plan to support name format for general display name in person level, considering the complexity and required effort. A workaround I can think of is configure person level name format for formal name and configure formal name in name format of general display name, then end user can configure name format in person level indirectly. But it is feasible if formal name has been used for other purpose already.

entry.title: Re: 🇸🇪 SAP CodeJam UI5 (Stockholm, Sweden)
entry.content: Where is this event?

entry.title: Application to use Cloud ALM
entry.content:
I would like to use Cloud ALM, please let me apply.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Application to use Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Dear customer,

you can request SAP Cloud ALM on SAP for Me for yourself or for all entitled customers for whom you have sufficient permissions.

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/provisioning?locale=en-US

For further steps refer to 3081894    How to Request SAP Cloud ALM? - Video

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
Hi @meenakshi_si , 

For non-EC customer after activating "Enable adoption of General Display Name", the value stored in standard element "displayName" is used globally in SF suite as employee name. If you have "NickName" from ECC and expect use this as employee name, you can upload it to "displayName", then it will be displayed across SF suite as employee name. 

Thanks

Harvey

entry.title: reference information missing or data type wrong using abap cds views with entity
entry.content:
Hi,

I am developing abap cds views with entity and below code  and getting error ZI_PLANNING-MON1 reference information missing or data type wrong, see long text

 

 

define view entity ZI_PLANNING as select from ZPS_REVENUE_PLAN

 

{

key proj_def as ProjDef,

key wbs_no as WbsNo,

key item_no as ItemNo,

key zyear as Zyear,

key vsn as Vsn,

tcurr as Tcurr,

deptm as Deptm,

dept_desc as DeptDesc,

prart_lvl4 as PrartLvl4,

prart_lvl5 as PrartLvl5,

prart_lvl6 as PrartLvl6,

prart_des4 as PrartDes4,

prart_des5 as PrartDes5,

prart_des6 as PrartDes6,

 

mon_1 as Mon1,

mon_2 as Mon2,

mon_3 as Mon3,

mon_4 as Mon4,

mon_5 as Mon5,

mon_6 as Mon6,

mon_7 as Mon7,

mon_8 as Mon8,

mon_9 as Mon9,

mon_10 as Mon10,

mon_11 as Mon11,

mon_12 as Mon12,

created_date as CreatedDate,

changed_date as ChangedDate,

created_by as CreatedBy,

changed_by as ChangedBy,

del_ind as DelInd,

remark as Remark,

tot_cost as TotCost,

tot_rev_cst as TotRevCst,

status as Status,

proj_def_back as ProjDefBack,

wbs_def_back as WbsDefBack,

billable as Billable

}

entry.title: Re: Cross Application Navigation Between SAPUI5/FIORI Applications In Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
This code seems to work.

try {
var Navigation = await sap.ushell.Container.getServiceAsync("Navigation");
var oParams = {
   FiscalYear: this._fiscalYear,
   InstanceID: this._instanceID,
   SupplierInvoice: this._supplierInvoice
};
const oTarget = {
   target: {
      semanticObject: "SupplierInvoice",
      action: "display"
   },
   params: oParams
};
const oComponent = this.getOwnerComponent();
await Navigation.navigate(oTarget, oComponent);
} catch (error) {
   console.log("Error during the navigation to SupplierInvoice-display: ", error);
}

entry.title: Re: Custom fields for special requests in Learning
entry.content: Thank you for the quick response! Just a follow-up question connected to data retention... If an employee who has registered special requests is terminated, how does the special request information show in the Registration Status report and on the class under Special requests? Will the user ID be anonymised?

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Windows > CTP System

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: People say I look like him

entry.title: Re: Custom tool tips in SAC
entry.content: This helped. Many thanks 🙂

entry.title: Connect to Laravel App
entry.content:
Good Morning.
 
I use a MiniSap 7.50 development server, and among many attempts like this, I can't access my API.
Please help me connect my platform to the SAP environment.

Thank you. Nuno Oliveira.
Here's my code:
 
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Report Z_GET_TOKEN_FROM_LARAVEL_API
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
REPORT Z_GET_TOKEN_FROM_LARAVEL_API.

DATA: lo_http_client TYPE REF TO if_http_client,
      lv_url         TYPE string,
      lv_body        TYPE string,
      lv_response    TYPE string,
      lv_token       TYPE string.

" Set the URL for the token request
lv_url = 'https://www,myLaravelApp.com/oauth/token'.

" Create HTTP client instance
CALL METHOD cl_http_client=>create_by_url
  EXPORTING
    url                = lv_url
  IMPORTING
    client             = lo_http_client
  EXCEPTIONS
    argument_not_found = 1
    plugin_not_active  = 2
    internal_error     = 3
    OTHERS             = 4.


" Set the request method to POST
*lo_http_client->request->set_method( if_http_request=>co_request_method_post ).

" Set the content type to application/x-www-form-urlencoded
*asForm():
*lo_http_client->request->set_header_field( name = 'Content-Type' value = 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' ).
*json:
lo_http_client->request->set_header_field( name = 'Content-Type' value = 'application/json' ).

" Set the request body with client credentials
*asForm():
*lv_body = 'grant_type=client_credentials&client_id=3&client_secret=OkwyTVAvxE9MrUc73MOahxeC55jIJm2adV39irQ9'.
*json:
lv_body = |\{ "grant_type": "client_credentials", "client_id": "3", "client_secret": "OkwyTVAvxE9MrUc73MOahxeC55jIJm2adV39irQ9", "scope": ""\} |.

lo_http_client->request->set_cdata( lv_body ).

" Send the request
CALL METHOD lo_http_client->send
  EXCEPTIONS
    http_communication_failure = 1
    http_invalid_state         = 2
    http_processing_failed     = 3
    OTHERS                     = 4.

IF sy-subrc = 0.
  WRITE: 'Request sent successfully'.
ELSE.
  WRITE: 'Error sending request'.
  RETURN.
ENDIF.

" Receive the response
CALL METHOD lo_http_client->receive
  EXCEPTIONS
    http_communication_failure = 1
    http_invalid_state         = 2
    http_processing_failed     = 3
    OTHERS                     = 4.

IF sy-subrc = 0.
  WRITE: / 'Request received successfully'.
ELSE.
  WRITE: / 'Error received request'.
  RETURN.
ENDIF.

" Get the response body
lv_response = lo_http_client->response->get_cdata( ).

WRITE: / 'Response:', lv_response.

entry.title: iphone or ipad with eSIM have no device ID, how to setup the SAP B1 Mobile
entry.content:
Hi, 

For iphone or ipad with eSIM have no device ID, how to setup the SAP B1 Mobile? Is SAP Business One not supported mobile device with eSIM yet?

entry.title: Re: Acknowledgment for PO item contains date variance - t...
entry.content: Perfect, thank you

entry.title: Re: Production Order Child Item is another BoM's Parent I...
entry.content:
Hi,

In your scenario, you need to generate second Production Order that makes child 1, then committed qty of child 3 & 4 will be changed.

Hope this helps,

SonTran

entry.title: Deployment of ML Models in SAP AC
entry.content:
Greetings everyone,

Just wanted to know that can we deploy our own ML Python based models for advanced analytics for reporting without S4/Hana or Datasphere. Currently using Sap Analytics Cloud with BW and nothing else. 

 

Thanks

SAP Analytics Cloud Machine Learning

entry.title: C4C - Routing ticket to new agent after esclation
entry.content:
Hi All,

Does in C4C Auto routing is possible?

Business Case: 

If ticket is not completed in given SLA, it should auto escalate to agent's TL or any other person automatically.. is this possible. If so can any one help me

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud. How to create OData v4 service for CDS view in Web UI?
entry.content:
Hi.

I can create purchase order CDS view in Web UI, for example. SAP automatically creates OData v2 service for the view with name "CDS view name"_CDS.

Unfortunately I could not find how to create OData v4 service.

Could anyone tell me how can I do it, please?

ps: when I speak Web UI, I mean this:

entry.title: Re: OSS Reporting in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @NiklasT 

Unfortunately, there is no OSS Reporting solution available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

With best regards,

Anja Danneberg

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Extension Setting for File Name Output in SAP...
entry.content: just leave the filename blank and the original file name will set automatically.
